title: TTS Voice Persona
description: Voice persona definition for Qwen3-TTS audiobook production. Used by bespoke reading personalities product.

version.description: Semantic version (e.g., 1.0.0). Increment on any voice_prompt or attribute change.

status.description: Lifecycle status: draft (testing), active (production), deprecated (phasing out)

voice_prompt.description: Natural language voice description for Qwen3-TTS. Layer: age, gender, accent, texture, pace, emotional baseline.

character_context.description: Optional character background for consistent delivery

transcript.description: Exact transcript of reference audio (required for best quality)

duration_seconds.description: Duration of reference clip (3s minimum, 5-15s optimal)

voice_attributes.description: Voice characteristics. Use natural language for expressiveness; suggested values shown for consistency.

age_range.description: Age presentation (e.g., child, teen, young_adult, middle_aged, elderly, or specific like '40s', 'late 20s')

gender.description: Voice gender presentation (e.g., male, female, neutral, androgynous)

pitch.description: Vocal pitch (e.g., very_low, low, medium, high, very_high, or descriptive like 'medium-low')

pace.description: Speaking speed (e.g., very_slow, slow, medium, fast, very_fast, or descriptive like 'measured', 'unhurried')

texture.description: Voice quality (e.g., smooth, warm, breathy, husky, gravelly, crisp, or combinations like 'rich, resonant')

languages.description: Languages this persona can narrate (Qwen3-TTS supports: en, zh, ja, ko, de, fr, ru, pt, es, it)

use_cases.description: Recommended use cases (narrator, dialogue, children's, literary, etc.)

notes.description: Production notes, quirks, or special handling instructions

golden_reference.description: Path to golden reference audio for regression testing

sample_audio.description: Path to sample audio for preview
